segment-text: A REMOTE AREA OF LAX DAY

A United 747 barrels down the runway. It lifts off and passes overhead with a DEAFENING ROAR. And thats when . . . MARTIN RIGGS STEPS INTO FRAME He looks up at the underbelly of the jet. So low that he could count the rivets. Except Riggs doesn't appear to be in any shape to count anything. Unshaven. Hair matted. A grease-stained baseball cap pulled down low to keep the sun out of his blood-shot eyes. He raises a brown paper bag to his lips. Heaven help us * * * Rigg~ is back in the bottle.
ANOTHER PART OF THE REMOTE AREA
where a MERCEDES LIMO pulls up to a GULFSTREAM JET. The Gulfstream's engines are REVVING in preparation of take off.
staggering drunkenly through the weeds and tall grass that fringe this remote section of the airport.
(singing softly)
"Jingle bell, jingle bell, jingle bell * * * rock."

Go sleep it off somewhere.

Grab the suitcases!
